visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium shot of a young woman with long dark hair and a white long-sleeved shirt sitting in front of a large white plastic container with an orange lid. She smiles warmly at the camera, her hands placed on the lid. The background consists of a blue upholstered headboard and a white patterned quilt, suggesting a domestic bedroom or studio setting. (2) She lifts the lid to reveal the contents: a steaming red stew filled with rice cakes and a generous layer of melted white cheese. She holds up a white plastic bag containing deep-fried dumplings and begins adding them to the bowl. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the vibrant red color of the sauce and the textures of the food. (3) The camera focuses on the woman as she uses wooden chopsticks to pick up a rice cake, pulling long strands of stretchy cheese. She takes a bite and chews with visible enjoyment. Various text overlays in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom center of the frame, describing the food items. (4) The sequence continues with several close-ups of specific ingredients: a small pink sausage, a long translucent and ribbed noodle, a flat square fish cake, and a golden-brown fried dumpling which she shows to have a creamy white filling. Each item is lifted towards the camera for detailed inspection. (5) She then picks up a bright yellow slice of pickled radish and a small white quail egg, eating them in succession. The woman maintains eye contact with the lens, nodding and smiling as she eats. (6) In the final phase, she uses a white plastic spoon to scoop up a mixture of rice cakes, sauce, and cheese, taking a large mouthful. She continues to eat with high energy until the end of the clip, with variety-style text appearing to prompt interaction from the viewers.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 獵奇辣炒年糕. (2) [Subtitle]: 韓國TOP3連鎖 辣炒年糕中一個!. (3) [Subtitle]: 要加一些配料喔. (4) [Subtitle]: 辣炒年糕. (5) [Subtitle]: 還可以選擇辣度! 也有幾乎不辣的口味. (6) [Subtitle]: 香腸. (7) [Variety]: (QQ彈彈). (8) [Subtitle]: 粉耗子. [Variety]: ?. (9) [Subtitle]: 這是超Q超滑的粉條. (10) [Subtitle]: 近期韓國人吃辣炒年糕時 一定會加的配料~. (11) [Subtitle]: 大家也可以加這個看看喔. (12) [Subtitle]: 魚板. (13) [Subtitle]: 酥脆起司煎餃. (14) [Subtitle]: 裡面是甜甜的起司奶油餡喔 沒有什麼臭臭的味道. (15) [Subtitle]: 配醃黃蘿蔔真的很搭配. (16) [Subtitle]: 鵪鶉蛋. (17) [Subtitle]: 這樣用湯匙挖著吃 也超好吃的啦. (18) [Subtitle]: 我的靈魂食物就是辣炒年糕啦～！ 你們的靈魂食物是什麼呢？

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator eating in front of the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark wavy hair, wearing a simple white long-sleeved shirt and a small black clip-on microphone on her collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a dark blue fabric headboard and a white bedspread with a gray geometric pattern.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a cheerful, mid-tempo background music track featuring a repetitive rhythmic 'pip' sound played by a synthesizer. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, greeting the audience with a bright, high-pitched tone. (2) At 0:02, a distinct plastic rustling sound occurs as the woman opens the lid and moves a bag. The chewing sounds are clear and emphasized, with wet mouth noises indicating the sticky texture of the rice cakes. (3) Throughout the middle section, every time a new food item is presented visually, a subtle 'ding' or bubble-pop sound effect is layered over the speech to punctuate the information. The speaker's voice remains energetic, with frequent rising intonations to maintain engagement. (4) As she eats the various toppings, the sound of percussive chewing ('crunch' for the fried dumpling and 'munch' for the radish) is prominent. The background music continues as a constant loop under the dialogue and sound effects. (5) In the final phase, the sound of a plastic spoon hitting the bowl is audible, followed by a louder slurping sound as she finishes a large mouthful. The video concludes with the speaker asking a question in a friendly, conversational manner, followed by a brief fade in the music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Ingredient Showcase -> Tasting -> Interaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and showcase a popular Korean street food brand (Yeopgi Tteokbokki) and its various custom toppings while providing an engaging, high-energy mukbang experience for viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a specific brand of tteokbokki is shown, it appears to be a personal review rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form social media editing styles, combining ASMR-style chewing sounds with high-arousal narration and colorful captions to maximize viewer retention.
